{{Quote|Your division has failed me and blood must be shed if I'm to feel better.|[[Warlord/Legends|Warlord]] [[Zsinj]]|<ref name="X-Wing: Solo Command">''[[X-Wing: Solo Command]]''</ref>}}
'''Novin Bress''' was a scientist at [[Binring Biomedical Product]].

==Biography==
Bress was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]], with a lean build and greying hair. A member of the special operations division at Binring's facility on [[Saffalore]], Bress was part of [[Project Chubar]]. After discovering the possibility of escaped test subjects, [[Warlord/Legends|Warlord]] [[Zsinj]] called Bress and [[Edda Gast]] to [[Iron Fist (Executor-class)|''Iron Fist'']] to explain.

Doctor Gast calmly explained to Zsinj that it was feasible for test subjects to have escaped the explosion that [[Tuzin Gast]] set. Zsinj was angered, and set two [[Blaster/Legends|blaster]] pistols before Bress and Gast as if to invite them to commit suicide.

Instead, Gast fired her pistol directly against Novin Bress's chest, killing him instantly and satisfying Zsinj.

==Appearances==
*''[[X-Wing: Solo Command]]'' {{Ab|X-Wing: Solo Command (unabridged audiobook)}} {{1st|in book}}
